attributes.action:
Relax the law. 
Legalization of Marijuana. 
Medicinal and Recreational.
attributes.additional_details:
To Boost Economics the fasted way Socially.
To Socialise Communities all around the UK.
To Educate Marijuana and remove negative stigma.
To start new Medicinal Educated and Healthy cafe's to encourage Socialism and start the cultivation process systemically.
For sectioned social adult areas to accommodate Marijuana/tobacco to be smoked/used recreationally in a holistic, positive environment. For Marijuana to be seen positively in a holistic and cultured way away from children.
attributes.background:
With over 100,000 signatures, bring my petition to parliament. 
For Medicinal prescribed Marijuana Cafés to open.
Relax the law for Recreational Marijuana to be smoked with/without tobacco in selected social areas.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Legalise and fund medical cannabis cafés for medical patients
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/766340

Legalise and regulate cannabis for adults across the United Kingdom
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/766340
